bugs.title: Backend server unreachable — all API tests blocked (ECONNREFUSED :8080)
bugs.root_cause: Backend NestJS server is not running on localhost:8080. All test requests receive ECONNREFUSED, preventing any API endpoint from being exercised.
repro_steps: Run: cd E:/NEXUS-AI && npx playwright test tests/api/
Observe: every test immediately fails with 'connect ECONNREFUSED ::1:8080'
Confirm backend is not started: no process listening on port 8080
bugs.expected_result: Backend running at http://localhost:8080 responds to all API requests
bugs.actual_result: connect ECONNREFUSED ::1:8080 on every request — no server listening
bugs.fix_recommendation: Start the NestJS backend before running tests: cd E:/NEXUS-AI/backend && npm run start:dev. Ensure MongoDB is running and backend/.env is configured with PORT=8080, JWT_SECRET, and MONGODB_URI.

bugs.title: Auth module (6 endpoints) — 22 test cases blocked by backend unavailability
bugs.root_cause: Inherits from BUG-001. Backend not running; auth endpoints /api/auth/signup, /api/auth/login, /api/auth/me, /api/auth/refresh, /api/auth/logout could not be reached.
repro_steps: Start backend with npm run start:dev from backend/
Verify signup, login, refresh, logout, and /me all respond correctly
bugs.expected_result: All 22 auth test cases pass once backend is running
bugs.fix_recommendation: Resolve BUG-001 first. Additional known risk: auth refresh token flow reads refresh_token from httpOnly cookie — ensure Playwright cookie jar is maintained between login and refresh test steps.

bugs.title: Chat module (5 endpoints) — 19 test cases blocked by backend unavailability
bugs.root_cause: Inherits from BUG-001. Chat endpoints /api/chat/send, /api/chat/session, /api/chat/session/:id, /api/chat/history could not be reached.
repro_steps: Start backend with npm run start:dev from backend/
bugs.expected_result: All 19 chat test cases pass once backend is running
bugs.fix_recommendation: Resolve BUG-001 first. Known secondary risk: MOCK_AI env var must be set to 'true' for chat/send tests to avoid live Kimi API calls.

bugs.title: Models module (2 endpoints) — 9 test cases blocked by backend unavailability
bugs.root_cause: Inherits from BUG-001. Public endpoints /api/models and /api/models/:id could not be reached.
bugs.fix_recommendation: Resolve BUG-001 first. Ensure models.json is seeded into MongoDB on startup (models.service.ts seed logic).

bugs.title: Dashboard module (3 endpoints) — 9 test cases blocked by backend unavailability
bugs.root_cause: Inherits from BUG-001. JWT-protected endpoints /api/dashboard/stats, /api/dashboard/history, /api/dashboard/billing could not be reached.

bugs.title: Upload module (1 endpoint) — 5 test cases blocked by backend unavailability
bugs.root_cause: Inherits from BUG-001. Multipart file upload endpoint could not be reached.
repro_steps: Run upload tests from tests/api/ (note: upload spec not yet generated — needs Stage 3 extension)
bugs.fix_recommendation: Resolve BUG-001. Note: upload test spec was not generated in Stage 3 (no upload.spec.ts). Add upload tests and ensure uploads/ directory exists in backend.

bugs.title: Forms module (2 endpoints) — 8 test cases blocked by backend unavailability
bugs.root_cause: Inherits from BUG-001. Public form endpoints could not be reached.

bugs.title: upload.spec.ts not generated — TC-060 through TC-064 have no Playwright script
bugs.root_cause: Stage 3 did not generate an upload.spec.ts file. The 5 upload test cases (TC-060 to TC-064) exist in testcases.json but have no corresponding Playwright script. Multipart file upload requires special handling (Buffer/blob construction) that was deferred.
repro_steps: Check E:/NEXUS-AI/tests/api/ — no upload.spec.ts file exists
Note TC-060 through TC-064 in testcases.json have no corresponding spec
bugs.expected_result: upload.spec.ts exists in tests/api/ with tests for TC-060 through TC-064
bugs.actual_result: No upload.spec.ts — upload test cases have no Playwright coverage
bugs.fix_recommendation: Create tests/api/upload.spec.ts. Use Playwright request.post with multipart form data (fetch FormData or Buffer approach). Requires binary file fixture for image upload tests.

resolution_priority: 1. Start backend: cd E:/NEXUS-AI/backend && cp .env.example .env && npm install && npm run start:dev
2. Ensure MongoDB is running on localhost:27017
3. Re-run: cd E:/NEXUS-AI && npx playwright test tests/api/
4. Create tests/api/upload.spec.ts for TC-060 through TC-064
